name: Hotjar
tagline: Behavioral analytics with heatmaps and session recordings
description: Heatmaps, recordings, and surveys for understanding website users
pros: Session recordings with rage click detection
Feedback widgets at moment of experience
Generous free tier with 35 daily sessions
cons: Lower plans capture only 1-3% of visitors
Form PII masking must be configured
Business plan at $99/month for advanced features

content.title: Executive Summary
content.body: Heatmaps, recordings, and surveys for understanding website users Hotjar earns a 4.1/5 rating from 8,400 user reviews.

content.title: TL;DR
content.body: Hotjar is a leading analytics platform rated 4.1/5 across 8,400 reviews. Pricing starts at Free–$99/mo (Scale). Best for UX Designers and Product Managers.

content.title: Rating Overview
content.body: Hotjar scores 4.1/5 overall with features (4/5), ease of use (4.5/5), support (3.9/5), value (4.2/5), performance (4.1/5).

content.title: Quick Verdict
content.body: Hotjar earns a 4.1/5 rating recommended for UX Designers and Product Managers. Delivers solid functionality with intuitive interface.

content.title: Company Background
content.body: Hotjar was founded in 2014 in Sliema, Malta, serving 900,000+ customers with 300+ employees.

content.title: Product Overview
content.body: Hotjar is a behavioral analytics with heatmaps and session recordings. Provides 18 features across Core, Feedback, Analytics, Security, Productivity, Integrations categories. API available.

content.title: Key Features
content.body: Essential analytics features:
items: Session Recordings: User playback with rage clicks.
Data Filters: URL, device, browser filters.

content.title: Feature Deep Dive
content.body: Heatmaps. Click, move, scroll visualizations. Session Recordings. User playback with rage clicks. Feedback Widgets. On-page NPS and rating surveys.

content.title: AI Features
content.body: Hotjar AI includes AI heatmap analysis, Session replay highlights.

content.title: API & Automation
content.body: Hotjar provides a comprehensive API for custom integration and workflow automation.

content.title: Security
content.body: Hotjar holds SOC 2 Type II, GDPR certifications with TLS 1.2+ and AES-256 encryption.

content.title: Compliance
content.body: Hotjar complies with GDPR, CCPA regulations.

content.title: Integrations
content.body: Integrates with Google Analytics, Slack, Jira, Shopify, WordPress, Zapier, HubSpot, Segment, and 2+ more.

content.title: Pricing
content.body: Hotjar uses freemium with usage-based tiers. Free tier available. Plans from Free–$99/mo (Scale).

content.title: Pros
content.body: Hotjar advantages:
items: Session recordings with rage click detection
Feedback widgets at moment of experience

content.title: Cons
content.body: Considerations:
items: Lower plans capture only 1-3% of visitors
Form PII masking must be configured
Business plan at $99/month for advanced features

content.title: Performance
content.body: Adequate performance for most use cases.

content.title: Ease of Use
content.body: Hotjar has a low learning curve with intuitive interface.

content.title: User Experience
content.body: Streamlined modern interface.

content.title: Customer Support
content.body: Support rated 3.9/5 via email and knowledge base.

content.title: Industry Fit
content.body: Best for Analytics and UX Research with UX Designers and Product Managers teams.

content.title: Team Size Fit
content.body: Hotjar accommodates teams of all sizes with generous free tier. Best ROI for 5-50 person teams.

content.title: Real Use Cases
content.body: A ux designers team uses Hotjar to streamline analytics workflows and improve team productivity.

content.title: Competitor Analysis
content.body: Hotjar competes with amplitude, google-analytics. Primary differentiators: core functionality and ease of use.

content.title: Alternatives
content.body: Consider amplitude, google-analytics based on specific team requirements.

content.title: Migration Guide
content.body: Migration rated low complexity. Most teams transition within 1-2 weeks. Parallel testing recommended.

content.title: Buying Advice
content.body: Evaluate: feature alignment, total cost at Free–$99/mo (Scale), migration effort (1-2 weeks), and real-data trial.

content.title: Final Verdict
content.body: Hotjar earns 4.1/5. Solid option for most teams. Recommended for teams prioritizing behavioral insights.
